text.title: AI Governance and Compliance — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output spec.

list.item: Input: Model + use case description.
Action: Run EU AI Act tier rubric → unacceptable / high / limited / minimal.
Output: governance/risk_tier.json.
Decision gate: If unacceptable, abort deployment.
Input: Training artefacts.
Action: Author model card + datasheet from artefacts.
Output: docs/model-cards/<id>-<ver>.md + docs/datasheets/<dataset>-<date>.md.
Decision gate: If artefacts missing, block release.
Input: Eval data + protected attributes.
Action: Run Fairlearn / AIF360; run SHAP; document mitigations.
Output: fairness/audit.json + explainability/report.md.
Decision gate: If disparity > policy threshold, mitigate before launch.
Input: Logging infra + DB.
Action: Implement hash-chained audit + retention policy + right-to-deletion path.
Output: audit_trail.sql + retention.yaml + deletion endpoint.
Decision gate: If hash chain not feasible, use a write-once log store.
Input: DRI list, decision examples.
Action: Document who reviews which decisions, SLA, escalation.
Output: oversight.md with DRI assignments.
Decision gate: If oversight SLA unmet for 30 days, freeze the model.
